title: Intensely Sweet Kenyan Yogurt Pilaf
description: A sweet and fluffy Kenyan dish featuring yogurt and score-fat, perfect for a Jain-friendly meal prep option. This pilaf is a delicious and healthy breakfast choice.
instructions: Rinse the basmati rice in a fine mesh sieve until the water runs clear.
In a medium saucepan, combine the rice and 2 cups of water, and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes, or until the water is absorbed and the rice is tender.
In a large bowl, whisk together the yogurt, melted score-fat, sugar, cardamom powder, and rose water, if using.
Fluff the cooked rice with a fork and add it to the bowl with the yogurt mixture.
Stir until the rice is well coated with the yogurt mixture.
Transfer the pilaf to a serving dish and garnish with chopped pistachios.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
Refrigerate or freeze for later use.
